scripts.dev: npm run build -w @vegan-tools/domain && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @vegan-tools/api" "npm run dev -w @vegan-tools/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @vegan-tools/domain && npm run build -w @vegan-tools/api && npm run build -w @vegan-tools/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run check:secrets
